copyright: © 2026 NexVigilant, LLC. Primitive stoichiometry and balanced equation encoding are proprietary NexVigilant methods.
title: Stoichiometry — Primitive Equation Encoding
description: Encode PV concepts as balanced primitive equations, decode equations back to concepts, find sister concepts via Jaccard similarity, compute thermodynamic mass state (entropy, Gibbs), search the built-in dictionary, verify balance, generate proofs, and check isomers. Pure Rust via nexcore-stoichiometry.

tools.name: encode
tools.description: Encode a concept and its definition as a balanced primitive equation. Returns the equation, balance status, and display form.

tools.name: decode
tools.description: Decode a balanced equation back to a Jeopardy-style 'What is X?' answer.

tools.name: sisters
tools.description: Find sister concepts with overlapping primitive compositions via Jaccard similarity.

parameters.name: concept
parameters.description: Concept name to find sisters for

tools.name: mass-state
tools.description: Compute thermodynamic mass state for a concept — entropy, Gibbs free energy, equilibrium status, depleted/saturated primitives.

tools.name: dictionary
tools.description: List or search the built-in PV term dictionary. Action 'list' returns all terms; 'search' filters by primitive name.

tools.name: is-balanced
tools.description: Check if a balanced equation satisfies primitive conservation. Returns balance status and per-primitive deficit.

tools.name: prove
tools.description: Generate a balance proof showing reactant/product mass conservation with per-primitive inventories.

tools.name: is-isomer
tools.description: Check if two equations are isomers (same primitive set, different dominant). Returns isomer status and Jaccard similarity.
